canonical_sequence: SEE  → see phase (evidence collection — WebSearch replaces web.run)
MMD  → mmd phase (multi-modal decomposition into subtasks)
pipeline_position.note: SIE-sandcrawler-SEE are the first three stages of the MetaBlooms pipeline. GAP replaces the implicit assumption that SEE+ACA+MMD are sufficient.

r12fi.description: First two reasoning phases. R1 declares intent; R2 decomposes to subtasks. Together they form the FORWARD INFERENCE baseline that the backward pass checks against.
r12fi.fallback: BP1 and BP2 degrade to INFO-level findings if absent

fir.description: Failure Inspection Report from the previous run. RF1-RF4 output. Used by BP5 to detect REPEAT gaps — the same gap appearing in two consecutive runs signals a systemic issue that evolution_engine should address.
fir.fallback: BP5 skipped if fir is absent or has no proposals

see_artifacts.description: Artifact IDs produced by the SEE evidence collection phase. In the SIE-sandcrawler-SEE pipeline, WebSearch results are committed as SEE artifacts.

aca_artifacts.description: Artifact IDs from the ACA assumption analysis phase.

mmd_artifacts.description: Artifact IDs from the MMD multi-modal decomposition phase.

backward_pass_phases.name: bp1_intent_drift
backward_pass_phases.research_basis: RT-ICA backward abduction: necessary conditions for outcome

backward_pass_phases.name: bp2_evidence_completeness
backward_pass_phases.research_basis: RT-ICA: compare necessary conditions against available evidence

backward_pass_phases.name: bp3_assumption_resolution
backward_pass_phases.research_basis: Metacognitive monitoring: ACA assumptions must be grounded in SEE evidence

backward_pass_phases.name: bp4_decomp_coverage
backward_pass_phases.research_basis: Missing middle: subtask without execution plan is a pipeline gap

backward_pass_phases.name: bp5_fir_repeat
backward_pass_phases.research_basis: Cross-run learning: repeat gaps from FIR signal systemic issues

mmd_phase.does: Decomposes intent into governed subtasks (multi-modal decomposition)
does_not_do: Check if subtasks are aligned with R1 intent (intent drift)
Check if SEE evidence covers all subtask requirements
Check if ACA assumptions are resolved
Detect repeat gaps from previous runs

adds: BP1: backward pass from R2 subtasks → R1 intent (drift detection)
BP2: backward pass from R2 subtasks → SEE evidence (completeness)
BP3: ACA assumption → SEE evidence delta (unresolved assumptions)
BP4: MMD subtask → execution plan presence (decomp coverage)
BP5: current gaps → FIR history (repeat gap systemic detection)
gap_detector.research_basis: RT-ICA arXiv:2512.10273 — outperforms forward-only CoT on missing information detection

RT-ICA.paper: arXiv:2512.10273 — Reverse Thinking Enhances Missing Information Detection
RT-ICA.method: Backward abductive reasoning from required outcome to necessary conditions
RT-ICA.gap: Full LLM-based backward inference not yet wired (requires llm_caller injection)

information_theoretic_cot.method: Measure information gain at each reasoning step; flag low-gain steps
information_theoretic_cot.gap: Full per-step information gain calculation requires access to model logits

metacognitive_monitoring.gap: Multi-path self-consistency requires multiple reasoning traces

fir_cross_run_learning.method: Cross-run gap pattern detection using reflector output
